hooks.command: in="$(cat)"; if printf '%s' "$in" | grep -iqE '\b(delete|drop|truncate|alter|update|merge)\b'; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Destructive/bulk-mutating SQL (DELETE/DROP/TRUNCATE/ALTER/UPDATE/MERGE) via the DB MCP is blocked during the v3 overnight run — matched as a whole word ANYWHERE in the statement. Surface to Kevin for explicit per-op approval; disable via /hooks to run one. Guard is build-scoped: remove at teardown."}}'; fi

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"POST-COMPACTION — festival-navigator v3 design build (overnight, unattended). Before ANY action, READ IN FULL: claude-plans/2026-07-09-v3-grounding.md, then claude-plans/2026-07-09-v3-design-build.md, then NOW.md. Post-compaction sessions drift toward doing the minimum — that is THE failure mode here; refuse it. Kevin authorized promote-to-production for THIS run when P6 passes fully. Codex gates block at P2 and P6. Commit per unit; bank state; keep the loop pacing."}}'

echo '{"systemMessage":"Compaction imminent (festival-navigator v3 overnight build) — ensure NOW.md reflects live state plus the exact next step before anything else. The next instance re-grounds from claude-plans/2026-07-09-v3-grounding.md."}'
